positive: A vibrant, symmetrical design of a stylized celestial fox (kitsune) silhouette sitting gracefully amongst neon glowing stylized flora and crystalline energy particles. The scene should be highly contrasted, featuring deep indigo and cosmic purple backgrounds contrasted by electric cyan, magenta, and gold accents. The main subject (the fox) must have clean, sharp lines and a prominent central placement. Use a highly detailed, graphic novel aesthetic with a geometric low-poly influence, ensuring the design is isolated and ready for apparel printing. Minimalist yet complex pattern work.
negative: blur, smudge, artifacts, low resolution, signature, watermark, text, cropped, bad anatomy, extra limbs, noise, grain, dirty, grayscale, logo, cartoon, realistic photograph, photographic quality
